name: HMCS Oshawa (J 330)
events: 28 Sep 1944 HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Oshawa (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J.C. Pratt, RCNVR).
[There are no logs available for HMS Upright for October and November 1944 so no details can be provided for these months. She remained at Bermuda for A/S training though.] (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
